name: Pi Coding Agent
description: Installs pi, the minimal terminal coding agent harness. Mounts host ~/.pi/agent into the container to share settings, sessions, extensions, skills, and themes.

version.description: Version of @earendil-works/pi-coding-agent to install. Use 'latest' for the most recent release, or pin to a specific semver (e.g. 0.75.5).
